stemHtml: In a dual FMS architecture, when an incompatibility between the two FMC's occurs: NB: FMC = Flight Management Computer

options.a: both FMC`s are automatically switched OFF.
options.b: one FMC is automatically switched OFF.
options.c: both FMC's are working independently; they are linked only to their own peripherals.
options.d: the left FMC becomes the master FMC.
